## LibraryRuntime.FatIngredient class

A resolved view of a fat ingredient with navigation capabilities. Immutable - does not allow modification of underlying data.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class FatIngredient extends IngredientBase implements IFatIngredient 
```
**Extends:** [IngredientBase](./ts-chocolate.libraryruntime.ingredientbase.md)

**Implements:** [IFatIngredient](./ts-chocolate.libraryruntime.ifatingredient.md)

## Remarks

The constructor for this class is marked as internal. Third-party code should not call the constructor directly or create subclasses that extend the `FatIngredient` class.
